page_content:
CLFS665 Ecology and Global Change (3 Credits)

Ecological concepts across scales ranging from the individual,

to populations, communities, ecosystems, and landscapes will

be presented. Global change issues will encompass alteration of atmospheric trace gases, biogeochemistry cycles, land use changes, and introduction of non-native species to new habitats.

Credit Only Granted for. LFSC609C or LFSC665.
